raw_consumer_statement:
Late XXXX and early XXXX woman saying she was with Citibank fraud- her name she said was XXXX XXXX me not to use the card because Citi was doing an investigation about my card saying there on line fraud in XXXX and since it was I very complicated case involving apple she told me not to log in on my app or computer until they resolved the case. 
Several weeks later I found out there was a charge of XXXX. She went across state lines from Maryland to New Jersey and opened a Citibank savings and checking account linked to my credit card and did a cc advance to a fraudulent person in my name. 
The last time I used my Citicard was on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX XXXX in XXXX Maryland. I believe XXXX said she closed the account and would let me know- In did not know at the time that XXXX was a criminal pretending to work at Citicard. 
Without my knowledge she did a cash advance of XXXX dollars to on XX/XX/XXXX the reference number is # XXXXCash Advance. She called me for several weeks and told me they were still working on my account and not to log in. When I did, I saw XXXX dollars charged to my credit card along with bank accounts in my name at a different address and person in New Jersey. 
When I tried to report the incident this XXXX person changed my address, my phone number and my password and my pin. I spent countless hours calling your fraud department to explain the story. I filed reports with all the credit bureaus I filed a police report with XXXX Maryland Police. I called CITI to provide them with those details. This was a horrible and clear-cut case of identity fraud with Citi- all divisions and went across state lines. I did not see the denial letter because my it went into my neighbor mailbox and she didnt get it over to me until this past week. 
Next steps for you- open up a dispute case and provide me with a new number. 
Please contact me asap as my next steps are to notify the CFPB and call the FBI- I am completely devasted and shocked by what happened to me and need a speedy resolution to this awful event. This has been absolutely horrible.
